tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text:
Everyone knows that staying 1.1. _________ is one of life's greatest treasures. The good news is that it does not depend on luck; instead, it is largely a 1.2. _________ we make every single day. Doctors say that taking regular physical 1.3. _________ is one of the best things we can do for our bodies. Even a short daily walk helps to build 1.4. _________ in our muscles and bones.

Eating well matters too. People who eat fruit and vegetables 1.5. _________, rather than only at weekends, tend to feel far better. On the other hand, too much sugar can be surprisingly 1.6. _________ to our teeth and our hearts.

If you are unsure where to begin, a doctor can give you useful 1.7. _________. Small changes, repeated over time, bring 1.8. _________ effects that last a lifetime.
